contradictions.finding: Current state machine has no 'check' intermediary states — phases route directly. DocsCheck would be the first 'decision gate' state that conditionally skips a phase.
contradictions.resolution: Implement DocsCheck as a transient state that auto-resolves in the same route() call — no agent dispatch, just config lookup + crate match. If skip, advance directly to ChangeMergeCreated. Pattern: same as how alignment_warnings is computed inline.

contradictions.finding: Doc-reviewer needs Bash to run CLI commands for accuracy verification. But agents with Bash can potentially modify files. The doc-reviewer should be read-only.
contradictions.resolution: Doc-reviewer agent has Bash (read-only intent enforced by prompt) + Read + Glob + Grep. No Write tool. Verdict recorded via artifact CLI command. Same pattern as sdd-review agent.

assumptions_verified: CRR cycle for docs follows same pattern as implementation CRR (max revisions, auto-approve)
Docs written directly to output_dir, not to change archive
Dedicated sdd-doc-writer agent with Write access, sdd-doc-reviewer without
All 4 execution mode presets need docs phase entries in agents config
No merge logic changes — docs files committed naturally by git auto_commit
